## ScrollToTop class

The `ScrollToTop` component is a button that the user can click to make a container scroll up to its initial position.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class ScrollToTop extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.scrolltotop.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | Animation to use for showing/hiding the button. |
|  [scrollId](./x-components.scrolltotop.scrollid.md) |  | string | Id of the target scroll component. |
|  [thresholdPx?](./x-components.scrolltotop.thresholdpx.md) |  | number | <i>(Optional)</i> Threshold in pixels from the top to show the button. |
